description: Federal Form W-4 (2020+ redesign) withholding election, one record per employee per filing.

fields.description: The legal entity this W-4 applies to. Auto-fills from Employee.
fields.label: Company

fields.description: Tax year this withholding election applies to. New W-4 typically filed at hire and re-filed on life-event changes.
fields.label: Tax Year

fields.description: First character of the employee's middle name, uppercased. Populated from the Employee record.
fields.label: Legal Middle Initial

fields.description: Enter 9 digits, with or without hyphens. Stored as a 9-digit string.
fields.label: Social Security Number

fields.description: Auto-generated masked view — ***-**-XXXX where XXXX is the last 4.
fields.label: SSN (masked)

fields.description: Check the appropriate box on the W-4 form.
fields.label: Filing Status
fields.options:
Single or Married filing separately
Married filing jointly or Qualifying surviving spouse
Head of household

fields.label: Step 2 — Multiple Jobs or Spouse Works

fields.description: Complete only if applicable. Improves withholding accuracy when either (a) the employee has more than one job, or (b) is married filing jointly and the spouse also works.
fields.label: Multiple Jobs or Spouse Works

fields.description: Number of qualifying children under age 17. Multiplied by $2,000 for the credit.
fields.label: Qualifying Children Under 17

fields.description: Other dependents. Multiplied by $500 for the credit.
fields.label: Other Dependents

fields.description: Auto-calculated: (qualifying_children × $2,000) + (other_dependents × $500). Line 3 total on the form.
fields.label: Total Credit Amount

fields.description: 4(a) Additional income NOT from jobs (interest, dividends, retirement). Increases withholding.
fields.label: Other Income Amount

fields.description: 4(b) Deductions the employee expects to claim above the standard deduction. Reduces withholding.
fields.label: Deductions Amount

fields.description: 4(c) Additional withholding to take each pay period. Direct addition to withholding.
fields.label: Extra Withholding Amount

fields.description: Employee claims exempt from federal income tax withholding. VALID FOR ONE YEAR only — must be refiled by Feb 15 of the following year. Employee must have had no federal income tax liability in the prior year AND expect none this year.
fields.label: Claim Exempt from Withholding

fields.description: Auto-set when status transitions to Signed.
fields.label: Signed Date

fields.description: IP address of signer at time of signing. Placeholder for now; will populate in Phase 2 public web form.
fields.label: Signature IP

fields.description: Upload the signed W-4 PDF here. This is the legal record of the employee's withholding election.
fields.label: Signed W-4 PDF

fields.description: If a newer W-4 replaced this one, links to it. Older W-4s stay in the record for audit.
fields.label: Superseded By

fields.description: Retention date auto-calculated per IRS: 4 years after tax return due date OR after tax paid, whichever later. Simplified here to signed_date + 5 years.
fields.label: Retention Until

name: W-4 Form
